══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kender — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 20 damage. Kender — Armored Escapist HP: 39/59
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 9 damage. Kender — Armored Escapist HP: 30/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kender — Armored Escapist --- HP: 30/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Kender — Armored Escapist HP: 8/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kender — Armored Escapist --- HP: 8/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (8/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kender — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 4 ══
